what: Mechanism-gated hardening plan; only changes with a mechanism to move/interpret the reported metric are built
rationale: Overlay injects prediction as diagonal rescale (verified from source run_eval_local.py) => metric is mean-only; model/training-side fixes cannot move it

Math standard; application to perturbation-prediction benchmarks is novel. Council: restate as exact-deterministic + asymptotic-under-noise; verify edge-flips empirically, do NOT claim 'exactly invariant'

Council redesign: decisive control is mean-matched null (real-doubles-means-through-overlay, cond B) vs additive-means-through-overlay (cond C). B>C => marginal-mean non-additivity (honest, within Wall-1). B~=C => advantage was cell-path joint structure (surprising, needs investigation)
Lead methodology-first; Wall-1 proven (corrected form), Wall-2 empirical (not a theorem)
Primary: existing 5-seed empirical DISCARD. Wall-1 is the scoped mechanistic explanation (overlay eval is mean-only), NOT a claim no eval could reward it
Collapses to per-gene mean at overlay; only bypass (instrument-fix on real cells) already null (Wall-2). Revivable only with a joint-structure-reading eval that does not exist
Confirmation of a negative; needs R + free CPU; off critical path

Mean-matched null: real doubles' non-additive MEANS give ~0 recovery advantage (B~=C). Entire A3 gap is real-CELL joint structure (A vs B, 5/5). A3 is NOT a VCM-help positive; recast as a positive control localizing recoverable signal to real-cell covariance = the channel Wall-1 metric and mean-output VCMs both cannot access. Sanity tests reproduce locked A3 numbers.

result.det_note: float32 storage epsilon not float64 zero

rationale: Verified against ACTUAL sample_perturbed_cells_overlay. Deterministic support-exact + corr float32-exact; Poisson residual substantial at realistic depth (honest, not machine-zero) shrinking with depth; same-mean/diff-joint identical support = airtight mean-only channel proof.

3 council objections closed: (1) TOST certifies B~=C equivalence not just non-detection; MDE 0.0047 < 0.021 gap = powered. (2) B preserves real means to ~1% while real-vs-additive means differ 14% yet B~=C = metric doesn't convert mean diff to edges. (3) permutation floor from committed A3 run; primary-GT floor high (compressed range) so claim rests on within-metric B-vs-C contrast. Scope corrected: A-B channel = cell-level joint distribution (cov+higher moments) not covariance exclusively.

Folded Wall-1 lemma (sharpens existing prop:ci-invariance from per-gene-monotone to mean-only), corrected the +0.111 proxy overclaim that contradicted Track-B null, added A3 positive control, preserved honest Wall-2 status (NOT upgraded to theorem). submissions/ gitignored so delivered as artifact.
